title: citrus grandis var. racemosa
intro: Citrus grandis var. racemosa, also known as the Pomelo, is a large citrus fruit tree native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Citrus grandis var. racemosa include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and aid in weight management. Herbal preparations of Citrus grandis var. racemosa include teas, juices, and extracts, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
